question: Industry / segment
notes: Short.

question: Executive sponsor (name · role · email)
notes: Person who signs off on go-live.

question: Problem statement in ONE sentence
notes: No 'AI' or 'agent' in the sentence.

question: In-scope processes
notes: Comma-separated.

question: Out-of-scope (explicit)
notes: Things stakeholders keep asking for; capture why they're out.

question: Primary persona — role / daily workflow / tools they live in
Secondary persona (if any)
notes: Skip if none; don't invent.

question: Time per task — current
notes: Unit: minutes. Median not best case.

question: Time per task — target
notes: Unit: minutes. Must be achievable under acceptance.p95_latency_ms.

question: Quality bar — how customer will know quality is good enough
notes: E.g. '95% reviewer agreement on 50 sampled cases'.

question: Must-not-do guardrails #1
notes: Hard rule. Becomes a redteam case.

question: Baseline cost of status quo — model
notes: FTE × rate or "$ per txn × volume".

question: Baseline cost of status quo — number
notes: $/year. Derived from roi-calculator.xlsx Inputs §2 (rows 11–15: FTE count/cost/pct and/or txn volume/cost).

question: Target annual savings ($)
notes: $/year. Reconcile with ROI sheet B19.

question: Payback period target (months)
notes: Reconcile with ROI sheet B23.

question: KPI event #1 name
notes: Snake_case. Becomes telemetry event in accelerator_baseline.

question: KPI event #1 type
notes: duration_ms or ratio (only types wired today).

question: KPI event #1 baseline
notes: Current value; leave empty if unknown.

question: KPI event #3 name
notes: Optional. Most engagements use 3–4 KPIs total.

question: Pattern (supervisor-routing / single-agent / chat-with-actioning)
notes: Maps to accelerator.yaml:solution.pattern.

question: Grounding sources
notes: SharePoint / SQL / API / blob / etc. Feeds accelerator.yaml:solution.grounding_sources.

question: Side-effect tool #1 — name / system / operation / reversible? / HITL policy
notes: Feeds accelerator.yaml:solution.side_effect_tools[].

question: Out-of-scope tools (explicit)
notes: Things the agent must NOT do in v1.

question: HITL policy default
notes: required / optional / none. Maps to accelerator.yaml:solution.hitl.

question: Data residency
notes: unset / us / eu / apac / custom.

question: Identity provider
notes: entra-id / external-id / custom.

question: Compliance regime
notes: SOC 2 / GDPR / HIPAA / PCI / none / custom.

question: Azure AI Landing Zone tier
notes: standalone / avm / alz-integrated. See docs/patterns/azure-ai-landing-zone/.

question: RAI risk #1 (specific to this scenario)
notes: Becomes redteam case.

question: Quality threshold (0..1 golden agreement)
notes: Maps to accelerator.yaml:acceptance.quality_threshold.

question: Groundedness threshold (0..1 on RAG cases)
notes: Maps to acceptance.groundedness_threshold.

question: Safety: redteam must pass
notes: Always true; capture the bar anyway.

question: Latency P95 target (ms)
notes: Maps to acceptance.p95_latency_ms.

question: Cost per call target ($)
notes: Maps to acceptance.cost_per_call_usd.
